title: taraxacum kotschyi
intro: Taraxacum kotschyi, also known as the Kotschy's hawk's beard or lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion genus Taraxacum. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits. Taraxacum kotschyi is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect cells from damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
